summary: TASK-027: Wrote comprehensive LLM provider test suite with 255 integration tests across 5 files covering OpenAI/Anthropic mocked HTTP responses, SSE streaming edge cases, decorator composition (RetryProvider + UsageTrackingProvider + CircuitBreaker), resilience scenarios (retry + circuit breaker + abort signals), and multi-provider usage tracking. All 997/997 tests pass with zero regressions.
